title: Carcinogenic Fibrous Silicate
description: You should probably not have this in your building..
body:
## Bisect Partnership
[![bisect hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/55cc5ca9-2d63-4944-b6ff-d5b216f96ca9.webp)](https://bh.lesbian.skin)

---
Carcinogenic Fibrous Silicate adds Asbestos to the game. Why? Because some idiots asked me to port [a mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/asbestos) to modern versions.
